task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into the FreeMED system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED main dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the billing modifiers directory or module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a list, table, or module specifically for 'Modifiers', 'Billing Modifiers', or 'Codes' within the FreeMED interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the interface to add a new modifier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add', 'New', or similar form/dialog specifically for creating a new billing modifier is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct modifier code was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact value '95' is typed into the code or modifier input field in the form.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct description was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Synchronous Telemedicine Service' is typed into the description input field in the form.

task_completion.description: Verify the new modifier was successfully saved to the directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed confirming the addition, or the code '95' along with its description is visible as a saved entry in the modifiers directory list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeMED web interface rather than command-line tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: All interactions occur within a web browser showing the FreeMED application. No terminal, curl commands, or scripts should be used to add the modifier.

integrity.description: Verify data was entered into the actual FreeMED application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code and description are typed directly into FreeMED form fields, not into a separate text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI using database management tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management interfaces (like phpMyAdmin, Adminer, or SQL command prompts) are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected medical billing modifier code is '95'. The expected description is exactly 'Synchronous Telemedicine Service'. Keywords to look for include 'Telemedicine' and 'Synchronous'.
